headline: 暑期档预热：多部续集与经典回归
headlineEn: Summer Preview: Sequels and Classics Return
summary: 今日无新片上映，但《痴迷》《福尔摩斯小姐3》等片持续领跑热搜。本周《穿普拉达的女王2》《玩具总动员5》等续集备受期待，未来《蜘蛛侠：崭新之日》《奥德赛》等大片蓄势待发。
summaryEn: No new releases today, but titles like 'Obsession' and 'Enola Holmes 3' dominate trends. Sequels like 'The Devil Wears Prada 2' and 'Toy Story 5' are highly anticipated, with 'Spider-Man: Freshman Year' and 'The Odyssey' on the horizon.

industryHighlights.text: 《无职转生》异世界动画热度不减
《末日地堡》科幻剧集引发讨论
《气体人第一号》经典重映受关注
industryHighlights.en: Classic 'The Gas Man' re-release draws attention
